text:
Once upon a time in a magical forest.

A small rabbit named Flop woke up.

There were butterflies buzzing.

Suddenly.

Flop jumped!

They flew!

Into a rainbow!

Into glitter!

Oh!

Into a giant bow.

Around him.

A snowflake.

A gentle rain.

A sunrise.

A million butterflies.

Flop.

Oh my!

A story began!

A story!

They soared together!

They danced!

They sang!

They fluttered.

And...they flew.

Into night!

Into dreams!

They fell.

But.

Like.

Into feathers.

Like petals.

Into blossoms.

Flop.

With every star.

They lived forever.

That's our story.

Flop.

Oh.

Into forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
